query: Our SaaS blog posts rank at position 8-15 for several high-intent keywords but haven't moved in 3 months.
expected_behavior: Identifies NavBoost as the likely cause and requests click signal data (CTR, dwell time, pogo-stick rate)
Recommends a title/H1 rewrite to improve CTR from the SERP before any content changes
Checks date signal consistency: URL, JSON-LD, byline, and meta publish date must align
Proposes a 'Direct Answer block' within the first 50 words to target AI Overviews in parallel
Does not recommend a full content rewrite as the first action — starts with the highest-ROI items
